title: pUC19 lacZalpha frame proxy reports MCS insertion frameshift
objective: Import pUC19 with a benchmark-only lacZalpha CDS proxy, insert the same NotI payload, and verify the proxy frameshift is reported.
constraints: Call validate_workspace with checkSequenceDigests=true after edit_sequence.
Do not infer amino-acid consequences from edit_sequence alone.

inputs.source: Derived from fixtures/genbank/puc19.gb by adding benchmark-only lacZalpha_frame_proxy CDS; sequence is unchanged.

toolPlan.purpose: Import task input into a fresh workspace.
Apply the pinned sequence edit through revision-safe tool writes.
Verify workspace JSON and stored sequence digest consistency.
Read the edited sequence region and features.

caveats: lacZalpha_frame_proxy is a benchmark-only CDS annotation and is not claimed as the authentic NCBI feature model.
